- JSON: /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/citywide_worker_income.json (Keys: avg_income_zero_worker, avg_income_single_worker, avg_income_multi_worker, citywide_total_households)
- CSV: /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_worker_profiles.csv (Columns: zone_id, total_households, zero_worker_count, single_worker_count, multi_worker_count, pct_multi_worker, avg_household_income)
